$comment: What the stats monitor watches. It NEVER edits site data — it only alerts (via a GitHub issue) when a public source drifts from these baselines, so a human can verify in-app and update. When you confirm and update a real figure on the site, bump its baseline here too.

metrics.label: Spotify monthly listeners
metrics.note: Shown on the site as ~53.49M (app/data/africasBiggest.ts). Re-verify in the Spotify app before updating.

metrics.label: Spotify peak monthly listeners (all-time high)
metrics.note: A new all-time peak is a milestone worth logging on /updates.

metrics.label: Global rank by Spotify monthly listeners
metrics.note: Burna Boy's position on kworb's global monthly-listeners ranking (lower is better). A move of 5+ places is worth a look.

metrics.label: Total Spotify streams (all songs)
metrics.note: Cumulative Spotify streams across every Burna Boy song — worth a milestone note as it climbs (e.g. crossing 11B).
